com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email

Class Email

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email.Email

  • public class Email
extends java.lang.Object

    Email provides interfaces for sending email using smtp server which is configured on a device or provided by a client.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static EmailAttributes getDefaults(android.content.Context context, Result result)
      Retrieves EmailAttributes parameters configured on a printer as default through EWS.
      static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)
      This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not.
      static void send(android.content.Context context, EmailAttributes emailAttributes, Result result)
      Request to send an email specified by EmailAttributes based on a printer's SMTP settings.
      static void send(android.content.Context context, EmailAttributes emailAttributes, SmtpAttributes smtpAttributes, ProxyAttributes proxyAttributes, Result result)
      Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using SMTP settings defined by SmtpAttributes
      static void send(android.content.Context context, EmailAttributes emailAttributes, SmtpAttributes smtpAttributes, Result result)
      Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using device's SMTP settings or client's SMTP information.

    • Method Detail

      • send

        public static void send(android.content.Context context,
                        EmailAttributes emailAttributes,
                        Result result)

        Request to send an email specified by EmailAttributes based on a printer's SMTP settings. Device's SMTP settings is configured through EWS.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, sending will be failed.
        emailAttributes - Attributes for sending email such as the content and recipients
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors which occurred while sending an email.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context/result) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • send

        public static void send(android.content.Context context,
                        EmailAttributes emailAttributes,
                        SmtpAttributes smtpAttributes,
                        Result result)

        Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using device's SMTP settings or client's SMTP information.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, sending will be failed.
        emailAttributes - attributes defining the content and recipients of the email
        smtpAttributes - (optional) settings custom SMTP settings, if null the device settings will be used
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors which occurred while sending an email.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context/result) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • send

        public static void send(android.content.Context context,
                        EmailAttributes emailAttributes,
                        SmtpAttributes smtpAttributes,
                        ProxyAttributes proxyAttributes,
                        Result result)

        Sends an email specified by EmailAttributes using SMTP settings defined by SmtpAttributes

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, sending will be failed.
        emailAttributes - attributes defining the content and recipients of the email
        smtpAttributes - (optional) settings custom SMTP setting, if null the device settings will be used
        proxyAttributes - (optional) Proxy information for setting custom proxy, if null the no proxy will be used
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors which occurred while sending an email.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context/result) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • getDefaults

        public static EmailAttributes getDefaults(android.content.Context context,
                                          Result result)

        Retrieves EmailAttributes parameters configured on a printer as default through EWS.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors which occurred while sending an email.
        Returns:

        Email settings which is configured on a device.

        • Return value can be empty list, if no attribute value is given for email.
        • Return EmailAttributes values, if attribute value is given for email.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context/result) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1

      • isSupported

        public static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)

        This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not. If it's not supported, Email operation will be failed.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Returns:
        boolean Returns result of supported. If service is supported, method returns true. Otherwise method returns false.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 1
